column1: # ESP32 Partition Table - OTA-capable for Modbus RTU Server (FEAT-031)
# Dual OTA app partitions + otadata for rollback support
# NOTE: First flash after partition change requires serial upload + NVS erase:
#   pio run -t erase && pio run -t upload
# OTA data partition (tracks which app partition is active)
# NVS partition (64KB for ST Logic programs + config)
# SPIFFS partition (640KB - reduced from 2MB to accommodate dual OTA)
